content_en:
Chapter 241

'What the hell is going on?'

In the blink of an eye, Langerstine Street turned into a battlefield. Simon felt his body and mind freeze.

Let’s assume, for a moment, that there could be a terrorist attack right in the middle of Langerstine.

However, the ones responsible for the attack weren’t fanatic priests, but none other than Loraine.

Crackle!

The battle unfolded fiercely. Loraine moved while drawing intense red lightning, and behind her, pure white feathers followed like guided arrows. Every time her red dagger slashed, the feathers split and fell to the ground.

Whoosh!

Soon, a dagger spinning in her opposite hand stopped with a clink, then shot out at an invisible speed.

Bang!

The dagger appeared right in front of Serne and was blocked by the shield magic protecting her.

With an enormous backdraft, surrounding windows shattered, and floor tiles were ripped off and flew, but Serne’s expression remained calm.

“I won’t just stand by and watch your tricks anymore!”

Loraine said, her eyes flashing with brilliance.

“If you won’t stand by, then what are you going to do?”

Serne replied with a sinister smile.

The red lightning of Loraine and Serne’s white feathers collided fiercely without giving an inch.

With the feeling that things were really escalating, Simon shouted.

“Wait, Loraine! I think there’s been a misunderstanding!”

Loraine’s chilling red eyes turned toward Simon. However, she only glanced briefly and immediately turned her head back to focus on the battle with Serne.

“Lor...!”

Thud! Thud!

Suddenly, two skeleton hands flew and grabbed Simon’s shoulders, then fixed him to the opposite building wall.

‘Loraine’s skeletons?’

No matter how much he moved, it didn’t budge. Simon, trapped, racked his brain.

‘Loraine doesn’t want me to get involved in the fight. At the same time, she doesn’t want to listen to me. Why?’

It wasn’t just blind rage, like a “don’t interfere” kind of feeling.

After thinking for a moment, Simon quickly figured it out.

‘She thinks I’ve been mind-controlled by Serne!’

Finally, the pieces of the puzzle in his mind clicked into place. Simon lifted his left foot and pressed it against the building wall.

‘Open Gate!’

A tentacle blade from the Overlord emerged from subspace and precisely severed the joints of the skeletons holding his shoulders, neutralizing them.

As Simon landed on the ground, his gaze turned serious.

‘So, the best thing I can do in this situation is…’

Simon pulled out a short sword from subspace and charged toward Serne.

Surprised by the sudden attack from behind while fighting fiercely with Loraine, Serne tried to counter, but...

‘Simon?’

Serne’s feathers barely stopped.

Simon immediately wrapped his left hand around her shoulder, pulling her toward him, and placed the blade of the short sword at her throat.

“!”

Seeing this, Loraine froze, looking greatly startled.

The battle between the two powerful foes, which seemed impossible to stop, finally came to a halt.

“Oh my, how bold~”

Rather than being angry, Serne seemed pleased, leaning into Simon’s arms.

‘Please, at least pretend to be tense!’

This girl couldn’t be helped. His head was throbbing, but now that the fight had stopped, it was the opportunity.

Simon spoke in a serious voice, looking at Loraine.

“Trust me, Loraine. I haven’t been brainwashed.”

She ground her teeth.

“How can I trust that? What if all this hostage situation was set up by Serne?”

There was room for conversation, but Loraine still didn’t ease her guard.

“Well, let me ask you the opposite. How are you so sure that I’ve been brainwashed?”

“The fact that you two, who had no significant contact at school, suddenly started pretending to be lovers is weird. And, more than anything, Serne making you sign a curse contract. That’s the decisive evidence.”

The curse contract was a terrifying black magic item that activated a curse if the subject broke the agreement.

Simon now understood what misunderstanding Loraine had.

“See it with your own eyes.”

Simon summoned a skeleton from subspace and had it bring the document.

Still eyeing them with suspicion, Loraine examined the document handed to her by the skeleton.

“.......”

It wasn’t a curse contract, but just an ordinary order form with names and addresses written on it. Disappointment flooded her expression.

‘Seeing him write a name, I immediately thought it was a curse contract.’

Even with a telescope, she couldn’t see the detailed contents of the contract. Still, she had attacked out of strong suspicion toward Serne.

It was the same psychology as when seeing a habitual drug addict putting strange powder in their mouth, immediately suspecting them.

Her only thought was to stop Simon from signing and going to the Ivory Tower.

Loraine picked up her communication crystal.

“Cease hostilities. Fall back.”

As soon as Loraine’s command was given, her subordinates retreated behind the thick explosion clouds.

Fortunately, neither Loraine’s subordinates nor the followers of the Ivory Tower seemed to have sustained any injuries.

They were all aware that if casualties occurred on either side, the situation would become extremely complicated, so they had tempered their strength.

“I’ve already reported to Langerstine City and the royal family. Focus on cleaning up. Estimate the damage and check for any casualties. I’ll contact the higher-ups of the Ivory Tower separately.”

Her subordinates scattered at her command.

“Ugh~ How boring. Was it really necessary to stop the fight just because of a misunderstanding?”

Serne smiled contentedly but provocatively wiggled her fingers.

“Both of us look equally disgusting, so why don’t we just stay at it?”

“If you want to keep fighting with me, do it in Keyzen.”

Loraine approached quickly and grabbed Simon’s wrist.

“Let’s go, Simon.”

“Where to?”

Serne also grabbed Simon’s other arm. In an instant, Simon found himself unable to move as both arms were held.

“I have something I need to do with Simon~”

Serne tugged at Simon’s arm as she answered. Loraine, as always, maintained a calm poker face.

“Coming here without even reporting to Keyzen is against the rules.”

“You came out too, didn’t you? Do you get special treatment because you’re Neftis’ daughter?”

“More than that, I still can’t fully trust that Simon hasn’t been brainwashed.”

Loraine gazed at Simon with a piercing look.

“What was all that about earlier, feeding cotton candy, running errands for ice cream, hugging him, all of it?”

“......!!”

Simon’s face turned as red as his ears at her words.

“D-Did you see all of that?”

He was so flustered his voice was trembling. Loraine nodded slightly.

“Oh, oh no! Let me explain...!”

“Hehe, why are you asking about something so obvious between a man and a woman~”

Serne wrapped Simon’s arm around her and said playfully.

“We have business to attend to. It’s related to the mission evaluation. Don’t worry, we’ll figure it out on our own.”

“Considering the precedents, how can I just ignore it? If it’s about the mission evaluation, then report it properly here.”

Just as if she had been waiting for that comment, Serne took out a letter from her jacket, smiling meaningfully.

“Ta-da~ Simon and I were invited to the Dresden royal ball! It’s a special mission request for the top male and female students of the first year. Naturally, the royal family wants the best pair from the first year, right?”

"......."

Loraine closed her mouth tightly, and Serne smugly spoke.

"Got it? From now on, we're going to buy clothes for the ball. A lot of people will see Simon and the Ivory Tower’s successor walking around together. They'll probably say how well you two suit each other, right? After the ball, people will talk about the relationship between Simon and the Ivory Tower!"

Loraine didn’t listen to the middle part of her words and took out a communication crystal from subspace.

As the connection tone played, she spoke.

"Yes, Mom."

Serne’s eyebrows twitched. But in an instant, she regained her relaxed smile and pushed her auburn hair behind her ear.

"At 17 years old, you're calling your mom first. Ah~ Should I contact my dad after a long time?"

Though not her biological father, Serne’s father was the current lord of the Ivory Tower.

"Yes, yes, I got it."

After finishing the call, Loraine looked at the two.

"The ball. I’ll be attending too. The royal family will nominate me by the end of the day."

Simon let out a chuckle. Is this what power is?

Loraine crossed her arms and continued speaking.

"You said we’re going to buy clothes for the ball? Then we can all go together."

"......."

Serne pouted with an annoyed face.

* * *

In the end, the three of them went together to buy clothes.

The largest and most expensive store in Langerstine. They decided to buy the ball attire here.

'Where am I? Who are these people?'

But throughout the walk to the store, Simon grew physically and mentally exhausted from the pressure of the two girls on either side of him.

Serne was so aggressive that she constantly used Simon to provoke Loraine, and Simon had to keep watching Loraine’s reactions.

It was unbearable.

‘I already miss my team members.’

When he was with the three members of Team 7, he could laugh and relax without a care.

But with Loraine and Serne, it didn’t feel like friends of the same age, they were more like incredibly high-maintenance, picky bosses. His energy was being drained in real time.

"Simon! How’s this?"

Serne came out wearing a dazzling wine-toned dress.

"It suits you."

"Anything else besides that compliment?"

"......You look pretty."

Serne had chosen an outfit that revealed her feminine curves boldly. She purposely chose dresses that exposed her chest or thighs, standing in front of Simon and enjoying watching his reaction.

Simon tried to dissuade her, telling her to wear something more normal since she was still a student.

On the other hand, Loraine was quietly selecting clothes on her own.

The clothes she chose were all similar, pastel pink or frilly princess-like outfits.

To be honest, they didn’t really match her chic vibe.

"Why are you only picking those kinds of clothes?"

Simon asked, unable to stay silent any longer.

"My taste."

"......."

There was nothing he could say in response to that.

"How unfortunate~ Your fashion sense seems stuck in childhood."

Serne said that, wearing a leopard print dress with black fox fur, laughing as she spread out a shawl and covered her mouth.

Simon spoke.

"......Can’t you tone that sense down a little?"

"Oh! That’s cute!"

Serne didn’t even listen and ran off. What she called cute was a dress with skin exposed.

Simon sighed.

"Since childhood."

At that moment, Loraine, who had picked a frilly dress, quietly spoke.

"My mom only made me wear drab, formal clothes and dragged me around. So I’m kind of tired of being calm."

"......Ah."

Eventually, a professional clerk, unable to watch anymore, picked a dress for Loraine.

It was a classic, clean black dress, and when she came out wearing it, both the clerk and Simon, as well as passing customers, were left speechless.

‘Wow, she really looks like a different person!’

She looked like a sophisticated adult, not a 17-year-old girl, and above all, it suited her perfectly.

It wasn’t that Neftis had only tried to dress her in dull clothes, but that this style suited her so well that there were no other options.

Loraine, seemingly a little disappointed, looked at the pink princess dress, but only after Simon and the clerk showered her with praise for how well it suited her did she let go of her regret.

"Ah, sir, you’ll buy a set too, right?"

The clerk turned to Simon as the next target. Without hesitation, she pulled out two tuxedos, comparing them before handing one to Simon.

"Would you like to try this one?"

Since it was Simon’s first time buying clothes like this, he accepted it without hesitation and went to the changing room.

A while later, Simon came out, fully dressed in the tuxedo.

He adjusted his bow tie slightly and then asked.

"How’s it look?"

"......."

"......."

Serne, Loraine, and even the clerk remained silent for a while.

Serne quietly began taking out the money to pay.

No comments yet. Be the first to leave a review!
content_cn_raw:
第241章

“到底是怎么回事？”

In the blink of an eye, Langerstine Street turned into a battlefield.西蒙感觉自己的身心都凝固了。

Let’s assume, for a moment, that there could be a terrorist attack right in the middle of Langerstine.

However, the ones responsible for the attack weren’t fanatic priests, but none other than Loraine.

裂纹！

战斗展开得很激烈。洛兰一边移动，一边引出强烈的红色闪电，而她的身后，洁白的羽毛如箭一般跟随。红色匕首每砍出，羽毛就会裂开，掉落在地。

嗖嗖！

Soon, a dagger spinning in her opposite hand stopped with a clink, then shot out at an invisible speed.

砰!

The dagger appeared right in front of Serne and was blocked by the shield magic protecting her.

With an enormous backdraft, surrounding windows shattered, and floor tiles were ripped off and flew, but Serne’s expression remained calm.

“I won’t just stand by and watch your tricks anymore!”

洛琳说道，眼中闪烁着精光。

“If you won’t stand by, then what are you going to do?”

瑟恩露出阴险的笑容回答道。

The red lightning of Loraine and Serne’s white feathers collided fiercely without giving an inch.

With the feeling that things were really escalating, Simon shouted.

“等等，洛琳！我想这其中有误会！”

Loraine’s chilling red eyes turned toward Simon.不过，她只是看了一眼，就立刻转过头去，专注于与瑟恩的战斗。

“劳尔……！”

咚！咚！

Suddenly, two skeleton hands flew and grabbed Simon’s shoulders, then fixed him to the opposite building wall.

“洛兰的骷髅？”

无论他怎么动，它都纹丝不动。西蒙陷入困境，绞尽脑汁。

“洛兰不想让我卷入这场战斗。 At the same time, she doesn’t want to listen to me.为什么？

It wasn’t just blind rage, like a “don’t interfere” kind of feeling.

想了想，西蒙很快就想通了。

‘She thinks I’ve been mind-controlled by Serne!’

Finally, the pieces of the puzzle in his mind clicked into place. Simon lifted his left foot and pressed it against the building wall.

“开门！”

霸主的触手利刃从次空间中浮现，精准地斩断了握住他肩膀的骷髅关节，将其化解。

As Simon landed on the ground, his gaze turned serious.

‘So, the best thing I can do in this situation is…’

Simon pulled out a short sword from subspace and charged toward Serne.

与洛兰激战时，塞恩对突然从背后袭击感到惊讶，试图反击，但……

“西蒙？”

瑟恩的羽毛几乎没有停止。

Simon immediately wrapped his left hand around her shoulder, pulling her toward him, and placed the blade of the short sword at her throat.

“！”

Seeing this, Loraine froze, looking greatly startled.

The battle between the two powerful foes, which seemed impossible to stop, finally came to a halt.

“哎呀，好大胆啊~”

Rather than being angry, Serne seemed pleased, leaning into Simon’s arms.

“拜托，至少要假装紧张！”

这个女孩没救了。他的头在抽痛，但现在战斗已经停止，这就是机会。

Simon spoke in a serious voice, looking at Loraine.

“Trust me, Loraine. I haven’t been brainwashed.”

她咬紧牙关。

“How can I trust that? What if all this hostage situation was set up by Serne?”

There was room for conversation, but Loraine still didn’t ease her guard.

“Well, let me ask you the opposite. How are you so sure that I’ve been brainwashed?”

「在学校里没什么交集的你们两个，突然开始假装恋人，这很奇怪。而且，最重要的是，塞恩让你们签下了诅咒契约。这就是决定性的证据。」

The curse contract was a terrifying black magic item that activated a curse if the subject broke the agreement.

西蒙现在明白了洛琳的误会是什么。

“亲眼看看吧。”

Simon summoned a skeleton from subspace and had it bring the document.

Still eyeing them with suspicion, Loraine examined the document handed to her by the skeleton.

“……”

这不是诅咒契约，只是一张普通的订单，上面写着姓名和地址。她的表情充满了失望。

“看到他写下名字，我立刻就以为这是一份诅咒契约。”

即使有望远镜，她也看不到契约的详细内容。尽管如此，她还是出于对瑟恩的强烈怀疑而发起了攻击。

这就像看到一个吸毒成瘾的人把奇怪的粉末放进嘴里，立即怀疑他们的心理是一样的。

她唯一的想法就是阻止西蒙签约并前往象牙塔。

Loraine picked up her communication crystal.

“停止敌对行动。撤退。”

洛琳的命令一下达，部下们就纷纷退到了厚厚的爆炸云层后面。

幸运的是，不管是洛琳的手下，还是象牙塔的追随者，似乎都没有受伤。

他们都知道，如果双方都有伤亡，那么局势就会变得极其复杂，所以他们都在淬炼实力。

“我已经向朗杰斯廷城和王室汇报了，集中精力清理，估计损失，检查人员伤亡情况，我会单独联系象牙塔的高层。”

她的部下在她的指挥下四散奔逃。

“呃～好无聊啊，真的要因为误会就停止战斗吗？”

塞恩满意地微笑着，但挑衅地摆动着手指。

“我们两个看起来都同样恶心，那我们为什么不继续做下去呢？”

“如果你想继续和我战斗，就用Keyzen来吧。”

洛兰快步走近，抓住了西蒙的手腕。

“我们走吧，西蒙。”

“去哪儿？”

Serne also grabbed Simon’s other arm.刹那间，西蒙发现自己的双臂被握住，无法动弹。

“我有事要找西蒙做~”

瑟恩一边回答，一边拉着西蒙的手臂。洛兰一如既往地保持着平静的扑克脸。

“甚至没有向 Keyzen 报告就来到这里是违反规定的。”

“你也出来了不是吗？因为你是奈夫蒂斯的女儿，所以你会受到特殊待遇吗？”

“不仅如此，我仍然不能完全相信西蒙没有被洗脑。”

洛兰用锐利的眼神看着西蒙。

“刚才那一切是怎么回事，喂棉花糖，跑腿买冰淇淋，拥抱他，所有这一切？”

“……！！”

听到她的话，西蒙的脸和耳朵一样红。

「你、你都看到了吗？」

He was so flustered his voice was trembling.洛兰微微点头。

“哦，哦不！让我解释一下……！”

“呵呵，男女之间这么明显的事情干嘛要问呢~”

瑟恩用西蒙的手臂搂住她，俏皮地说道。

“我们还有事要处理，这关系到任务考核，你放心，我们自己会想办法的。”

“有先例可循，我岂能置之不理？如果是任务评估的事情，就在这里好好汇报一下吧。”

就好像她一直在等待这句话一样，瑟恩从外套里拿出一封信，露出意味深长的微笑。

“哒哒~我和西蒙被邀请参加德累斯顿皇家舞会！这是一年级最顶尖男女学生的特殊任务要求。王室自然想要一年级最好的一对吧？”

“……”

洛兰紧紧地闭上了嘴，瑟恩则得意地说道。

“明白了？从现在起，我们要去买舞会的衣服了，很多人都会看到西蒙和象牙塔的继承者一起走来走去，他们可能会说你们两个多么般配吧？舞会结束后，人们就会谈论西蒙和象牙塔的关系！”

洛琳没有听她的话，从亚空间中取出了一枚通讯水晶。

As the connection tone played, she spoke.

“是的，妈妈。”

Serne’s eyebrows twitched.但转眼间，她又恢复了轻松的笑容，将赤褐色的头发别到耳后。

“十七岁了，就先给妈妈打电话了。啊~时隔这么久，是不是该联系爸爸了？”

塞尔恩的父亲虽然不是她的亲生父亲，但却是象牙塔的现任领主。

“是是是，我明白了。”

挂完电话，洛瑟琳看向两人。

“舞会。我也会参加。当天结束时王室会提名我。”

西蒙轻笑一声。这就是力量吗？

洛兰交叉双臂，继续说道。

“你说我们要去买舞会的衣服？然后我们就可以一起去了。”

“……”

瑟恩一脸恼怒地撅起嘴。

** **

最后，三人一起去买衣服。

朗杰斯汀最大、最昂贵的商店。他们决定在这里购买舞会服装。

'我在哪儿？这些人是谁？

但在前往商店的整个过程中，西蒙因两侧两个女孩的压力而身心俱疲。

瑟恩的攻击性很强，不断地利用西蒙来挑衅洛兰，而西蒙不得不一直观察洛兰的反应。

这是难以忍受的。

“我已经想念我的团队成员了。”

和七队三人在一起的时候，他可以无忧无虑地欢笑、放松。

但对于 Loraine 和 Serne，感觉不像是同龄的朋友，他们更像是令人难以置信的高维护、挑剔的老板。他的能量正在实时消耗。

“西蒙！怎么样？”

Serne穿着一件耀眼的酒色连衣裙走了出来。

“这很适合你。”

“除了这个夸奖之外，还有什么吗？”

“……你看起来很漂亮。”

Serne选择了一套大胆地展现她女性曲线的服装。她特意选择了露出胸部或大腿的衣服，站在西蒙面前，欣赏着他的反应。

西蒙试图劝阻她，让她穿得更正常一点，因为她还是个学生。

另一边，洛琳正在悄悄地自己挑选衣服。

她选择的衣服都很相似，有淡粉色的，有褶边的公主裙。

说实话，它们与她的时尚气质不太相符。

“你为什么只选那种衣服？”

西蒙再也无法保持沉默，问道。

“我的口味。”

“……”

对此他无话可说。

「真可惜啊～你的时尚感好像还停留在童年时期呢。」

穿着黑色狐毛豹纹连衣裙的塞尔恩一边说着，一边展开披肩，捂住了嘴，笑着说道。

西蒙说话了。

「……你就不能把这种感觉减弱一点吗？」

“哦！真可爱！”

瑟恩根本不听，就跑了。她所谓的可爱，就是露出皮肤的连衣裙。

西蒙叹了口气。

“从小到大。”

就在这时，挑选了一件荷叶边连衣裙的洛林小声开口了。

“我妈妈只让我穿土褐色的正式衣服，拖着我到处走。所以我有点厌倦了平静。”

“......啊。”

最终，一位专业店员看不下去了，为洛兰挑选了一件衣服。

It was a classic, clean black dress, and when she came out wearing it, both the clerk and Simon, as well as passing customers, were left speechless.

“哇，她看起来真的像变了一个人！”

她看起来像一个成熟的成年人，而不是一个17岁的女孩，最重要的是，这非常适合她。

奈夫蒂斯并不是只想给她穿单调的衣服，而是这种风格太适合她了，没有其他选择。

Loraine, seemingly a little disappointed, looked at the pink princess dress, but only after Simon and the clerk showered her with praise for how well it suited her did she let go of her regret.

“啊，先生，您也买一套吧？”

店员将西蒙作为下一个目标。她毫不犹豫地拿出两件燕尾服，对比了一下，然后把一件递给了西蒙。

“你想尝尝这个吗？”

西蒙第一次买这样的衣服，他毫不犹豫地收下了，然后去了更衣室。

过了一会儿，西蒙穿着燕尾服走了出来。

他稍微调整了一下领结，然后问道。

“看起来怎么样？”

“……”

“……”

塞恩、洛兰，甚至连店员都沉默了一会儿。

Serne悄悄地开始掏钱付账。

还没有评论。成为第一个发表评论的人！
content_cn:
第241章

“到底是怎么回事？”

转眼间，朗杰斯汀街道变成了战场。西蒙感觉自己的身心都凝固了。

暂且假设，朗杰斯汀市中心可能发生恐怖袭击。

然而，发动袭击的并非狂热的牧师，而是洛琳本人。

噼啪！

战斗激烈展开。洛琳移动时引出炽烈的红色闪电，身后洁白的羽毛如制导箭矢般跟随。她的红色匕首每挥砍一次，羽毛便分裂落地。

嗖！

很快，她另一只手中旋转的匕首叮的一声停住，然后以无形的速度射出。

砰！

匕首出现在瑟恩面前，被保护她的护盾魔法挡住。

巨大的反冲力震碎了周围的窗户，地砖被掀起飞散，但瑟恩的表情依然平静。

“我不会再袖手旁观你的把戏了！”

洛琳说道，眼中闪烁着光芒。

“既然不袖手旁观，那你打算怎么办？”

瑟恩露出阴险的笑容回答。

洛琳的红色闪电与瑟恩的白色羽毛激烈碰撞，互不相让。

感觉到事态真的在升级，西蒙喊道：

“等等，洛琳！我想这其中有误会！”

洛琳冰冷的红眸转向西蒙。但她只是瞥了一眼，立刻转回头专注于与瑟恩的战斗。

“洛……”

咚！咚！

突然，两只骷髅手飞来抓住西蒙的肩膀，将他固定在对面的建筑墙上。

‘洛琳的骷髅？’

无论他怎么动，都纹丝不动。西蒙被困住，绞尽脑汁。

‘洛琳不想让我卷入战斗。同时，她也不想听我解释。为什么？’

这不像是“别插手”那种盲目的愤怒。

想了想，西蒙很快明白了。

‘她以为我被瑟恩精神控制了！’

终于，脑海中的拼图碎片拼合到位。西蒙抬起左脚，抵住建筑墙壁。

‘开门！’

霸主的触手利刃从次空间浮现，精准地斩断抓住他肩膀的骷髅关节，将其化解。

西蒙落地时，目光变得严肃。

‘那么，这种情况下我能做的最好的事就是……’

西蒙从次空间抽出一把短剑，冲向瑟恩。

瑟恩正与洛琳激战，对背后的突然袭击感到惊讶，试图反击，但……

‘西蒙？’

瑟恩的羽毛勉强停住。

西蒙立刻用左手环住她的肩膀，将她拉向自己，将短剑的刀刃抵在她喉咙上。

“！”

看到这一幕，洛琳僵住了，显得非常震惊。

这场看似无法阻止的两强之战，终于停了下来。

“哎呀，好大胆啊~”

瑟恩没有生气，反而似乎很高兴，靠进西蒙怀里。

‘拜托，至少假装紧张一下！’

这女孩真没办法。他头痛欲裂，但现在战斗停止了，正是机会。

西蒙看着洛琳，用严肃的声音说道：

“相信我，洛琳。我没有被洗脑。”

她咬紧牙关。

“我怎么相信？万一这一切人质戏码都是瑟恩安排的呢？”

还有谈话的余地，但洛琳仍未放松警惕。

“那让我反过来问你。你怎么确定我被洗脑了？”

“你们俩在学校没什么交集，突然开始假装情侣，这很奇怪。而且，最重要的是，瑟恩让你签了诅咒契约。那是决定性的证据。”

诅咒契约是一种可怕的黑魔法物品，如果目标违反协议，就会触发诅咒。

西蒙现在明白了洛琳的误会。

“亲眼看看吧。”

西蒙从次空间召唤出一具骷髅，让它拿来文件。

洛琳仍然怀疑地看着他们，检查了骷髅递给她的文件。

“……”

那不是诅咒契约，只是一张普通的订单，上面写着姓名和地址。她的表情充满了失望。

‘看到他写名字，我立刻以为那是诅咒契约。’

即使有望远镜，她也看不到契约的详细内容。尽管如此，她还是出于对瑟恩的强烈怀疑而发动了攻击。

这就像看到习惯性吸毒者把奇怪的粉末放进嘴里，立刻怀疑他们的心理一样。

她唯一的想法就是阻止西蒙签约并前往象牙塔。

洛琳拿起通讯水晶。

“停止敌对行动。撤退。”

洛琳的命令一下达，她的部下就退到了厚厚的爆炸云层后面。

幸运的是，洛琳的部下和象牙塔的追随者似乎都没有受伤。

他们都清楚，如果任何一方出现伤亡，局势会变得极其复杂，因此都克制了力量。

“我已经向朗杰斯汀城和王室报告了。集中精力清理。估算损失，检查是否有伤亡。我会单独联系象牙塔的高层。”

她的部下在她的指挥下散开。

“呃~真无聊。真的有必要因为误会就停止战斗吗？”

瑟恩满意地微笑着，但挑衅地摆动手指。

“我们俩看起来都同样恶心，不如继续打下去？”

“如果你想继续和我打，就在凯森打。”

洛琳快步走近，抓住西蒙的手腕。

“我们走吧，西蒙。”

“去哪儿？”

瑟恩也抓住西蒙的另一只手臂。瞬间，西蒙发现双臂被握住，无法动弹。

“我有事需要和西蒙一起做~”

瑟恩一边回答，一边拉着西蒙的手臂。洛琳一如既往地保持着平静的扑克脸。

“来这里甚至没有向凯森报告，这是违反规定的。”

“你也出来了不是吗？因为你是奈芙蒂斯的女儿，所以有特殊待遇？”

“不仅如此，我仍然不能完全相信西蒙没有被洗脑。”

洛琳用锐利的目光看着西蒙。

“刚才那些是怎么回事？喂棉花糖、跑腿买冰淇淋、拥抱他，所有这些？”

“……！！”

西蒙的脸和耳朵一样红。

“你、你都看到了？”

他惊慌得声音都在颤抖。洛琳微微点头。

“哦，不！让我解释……！”

“呵呵，男女之间这么明显的事，何必问呢~”

瑟恩用西蒙的手臂搂住自己，俏皮地说。

“我们有正事要办。和任务评估有关。别担心，我们会自己解决的。”

“考虑到先例，我怎么能无视？如果是任务评估的事，就在这里好好报告吧。”

仿佛就在等这句话，瑟恩从外套里取出一封信，意味深长地微笑着。

“哒哒~我和西蒙被邀请参加德累斯顿皇家舞会！这是一年级最优秀男女学生的特殊任务请求。当然，王室想要一年级最般配的一对，对吧？”

“……”

洛琳紧紧闭上嘴，瑟恩得意地说：

“明白了吗？从现在起，我们要去买舞会服装。很多人会看到西蒙和象牙塔的继承人一起走动。他们大概会说你们俩多般配吧？舞会之后，人们会谈论西蒙和象牙塔的关系！”

洛琳没听她中间的话，从次空间取出通讯水晶。

随着连接音响起，她说道：

“是的，妈妈。”

瑟恩的眉毛抽动了一下。但瞬间，她又恢复了轻松的笑容，将赤褐色的头发别到耳后。

“17岁了，先给妈妈打电话。啊~我是不是也该联系一下爸爸了？”

虽然并非生父，但瑟恩的父亲是象牙塔的现任领主。

“是，是，我知道了。”

挂断电话后，洛琳看着两人。

“舞会。我也会参加。王室会在今天结束前提名我。”

西蒙轻笑一声。这就是权力的力量吗？

洛琳双臂交叉，继续说道：

“你说我们要去买舞会服装？那我们可以一起去。”

“……”

瑟恩一脸恼怒地撅起嘴。

* * *

最终，三人一起去买衣服。

朗杰斯汀最大、最昂贵的商店。他们决定在这里购买舞会服装。

‘我在哪儿？这些人是谁？’

但在去商店的路上，西蒙因两侧两个女孩的压力而身心俱疲。

瑟恩极具攻击性，不断利用西蒙挑衅洛琳，而西蒙不得不一直观察洛琳的反应。

简直难以忍受。

‘我已经想念我的队友了。’

和第七队的三名成员在一起时，他可以无忧无虑地欢笑放松。

但和洛琳、瑟恩在一起，感觉不像同龄朋友，更像是极其难伺候、挑剔的老板。他的精力正在实时消耗。

“西蒙！这件怎么样？”

瑟恩穿着一件耀眼的酒红色连衣裙走出来。

“很适合你。”

“除了这句夸奖，还有别的吗？”

“……你看起来很漂亮。”

瑟恩选择了一套大胆展现女性曲线的服装。她特意选了露胸或露大腿的裙子，站在西蒙面前，享受地看着他的反应。

西蒙试图劝阻她，说她还是学生，应该穿得更正常些。

另一边，洛琳在安静地自己挑选衣服。

她选的衣服都很相似，淡粉色或带褶边的公主裙。

说实话，它们不太符合她酷酷的气质。

“你为什么只选那种衣服？”

西蒙忍不住问道。

“我的品味。”

“……”

他对此无话可说。

“真可惜~你的时尚感好像还停留在童年。”

瑟恩穿着豹纹连衣裙，披着黑色狐毛披肩，笑着展开披肩捂住嘴。

西蒙说：

“……你就不能收敛一点吗？”

“哦！真可爱！”

瑟恩根本不听，就跑开了。她所谓的可爱，是露出皮肤的连衣裙。

西蒙叹了口气。

“从小时候起。”

这时，挑了一件荷叶边连衣裙的洛琳轻声说道：

“我妈妈只让我穿单调的正装，拖着我到处走。所以我有点厌倦了平静。”

“……啊。”

最终，一位专业店员看不下去了，为洛琳挑了一件衣服。

那是一件经典、简洁的黑色连衣裙，当她穿着出来时，店员、西蒙以及路过的顾客都看得说不出话来。

‘哇，她看起来简直像变了一个人！’

她看起来像个成熟的成年人，而不是17岁的女孩，而且最重要的是，这件衣服非常适合她。

并不是奈芙蒂斯只给她穿单调的衣服，而是这种风格太适合她，以至于没有其他选择。

洛琳似乎有点失望，看了看那件粉色公主裙，但直到西蒙和店员连连称赞这件衣服多么适合她，她才放下遗憾。

“啊，先生，您也买一套吧？”

店员转向西蒙这个下一个目标。她毫不犹豫地拿出两件燕尾服，比较了一下，然后递给西蒙一件。

“您想试试这件吗？”

西蒙第一次买这样的衣服，毫不犹豫地接过来，去了更衣室。

过了一会儿，西蒙穿着燕尾服走了出来。

他稍微调整了一下领结，然后问道：

“看起来怎么样？”

“……”

“……”

瑟恩、洛琳，甚至店员都沉默了一会儿。

瑟恩悄悄开始掏钱付款。
